fields.title: Implement context hook for AGENT_CONTEXT injection
fields.description:
## Task

Inject `AGENT_CONTEXT:` notices into messages before each model turn.

## File

- `extensions/tau/src/sandbox/agent-awareness/index.ts`

## Hook

- `context`

## Behavior

- Run detection before each turn (best-effort; must not throw)
- Inject when `count > 0` (every turn; avoid duplicates within a message)
- Inject once when `count` drops to 0 (previous > 0)
- Track previous count in `tau:state`

## DoD

- Notice is prepended to last user message `content[0]`
- Does not inject if `content[0]` already starts with `AGENT_CONTEXT:`
fields.close_reason: Implemented context hook to inject AGENT_CONTEXT notices based on overlapping pi processes
